title_en: SpaceX launches 24 Starlink satellites on Falcon 9 rocket from Vandenberg SFB
summary_en: The Starlink 17-46 mission flew on the 77th Falcon 9 rocket launch of the year. Liftoff from pad 4E at Vandenberg Space Force Base happened at 7:58 p.m. PDT (10:58 p.m. EDT / 0258 UTC).
